_comment: Per-seat model for the LLM Council. Edit values freely. Valid models: opus | sonnet | haiku | fable | default. Omit a key to use the built-in default. 'reviewers' sets all 5 peer reviewers. Precedence: inline message override > project ./council.config.json > this global file > built-in defaults. 'expert' seats the conditional Expert (auto | always | never). 'expert_research' (off | on) lets The Expert verify claims against external sources — off by default: research sends query text off your machine.
